notes: All core architecture fields are extracted from live config.json files in Unsloth model repos.
MoE models store total and active experts when exposed by config metadata.
module_shapes are precomputed for LoRA target modules q,k,v,o,gate,up,down to support accurate adapter parameter estimation.
